title: Rising Legends
description: [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions! Includes (almost) all features from the original modpack.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ea78b153981f4bb5a201ff5eaa8d0a91d97628.png)
# ABOUT
[RLCraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlcraft) Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions! Includes (almost) all features from the original modpack. Designed for 100 days challenges, hardcore singleplayer and multiplayer servers.
> The right mouse button double-clicking issue has been FIXED!

![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
* Fully Optimized with Shader Support
* Body Part Health, Thirst, Temperature System and Nutrition. (Eating food will no longer heal)
* Dragons, Dinosaurs and Other Mythical Creatures (Ice And Fire: Dragons, Prehistoric Dinosaurs)
* Mythic Mounts
* New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses Of Mass Destruction, Soulslike Weaponry, AdventureZ, Mutant Monsters)
* Completely Overhauled World Generation (Biomes O' Plenty, Geophilic)
* Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (When Dungeons Arise, AdoraBuild: Structures, Repurposed Structures)
* Battle Towers and Roguelike Dungeons
* New weapons, Tools and Armor
* Advanced Skill System
* 7 Dimensions Featuring The Twilight Forest, The Otherside, Graveyard and Mine Cells
* Physics for Blocks and Items (Break Animation, Pick Them Up by Right-clicking)
* QoL Features such as Waystones and XP Storage
* Artifacts and Rings Of Ascension
* Multiplayer features such as Simple Voice Chat
* Antique Atlas Minimap with Additional Features
* Chunk Animator
* Spawn Anywhere (RandomSpawn)
* Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience
* Built-in, Free World Sharing (e4mc)
* 300+ Mods

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft) [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions.
* [Arcane Dragons [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcanedragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Arcane Dragons [NEOFORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/arcane-dragons) [1.21.1] Dragons and Magic. The ultimate fantasy world!
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [FEAR](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fear) [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack.
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric) [1.21.X] Vanilla with improved visuals and performance.
